scope.summary: Split the existing dispatch audit-wiring contract-family tests into a child module while preserving the dispatch::tests::audit_wiring filter and lowering the measured max-file-size ratchets.
out_of_scope: Changing audit-wiring assertions or weakening the guard behavior they exercise.
Fixing the current semantic-read refusal failures in the audit-wiring family.
Any docs/plan or bead-title train-rename work.

entry_points.name: audit-wiring split commit
entry_points.trace: git show --stat --oneline 14bb6f40 reported only crates/oraclemcp/src/dispatch/tests.rs and crates/oraclemcp/src/dispatch/tests/audit_wiring.rs: 826 insertions, 833 deletions, new audit_wiring.rs.

entry_points.name: max-file-size ratchet commit
entry_points.trace: git show --stat --oneline 8f64f933 reported only scripts/oraclemcp_arch_fitness_lint.sh: 3 insertions, 3 deletions. The ratchets now cap dispatch/tests.rs at 15676 and the global tracked-source maximum at 15829.

entry_points.name: architecture fitness
entry_points.trace: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/home/durakovic/projects/oraclemcp/target scripts/oraclemcp_arch_fitness_lint.sh passed, including OK[file-size] for the lowered ratchets.

entry_points.name: moved filter remains discoverable
entry_points.trace: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/home/durakovic/projects/oraclemcp/target cargo test -p oraclemcp --lib -- dispatch::tests::audit_wiring:: selected 16 tests after the split. It failed 8 passed / 8 failed with ForbiddenStatement semantic-read refusals, preserving the assertions instead of hiding them.

entry_points.name: moved exact test still passes
entry_points.trace: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/home/durakovic/projects/oraclemcp/target cargo test -p oraclemcp --lib -- dispatch::tests::audit_wiring::served_write_appends_pending_then_signed_outcome passed: 1 passed, 364 filtered out.

entry_points.name: neighboring dispatch filter unchanged
entry_points.trace: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/home/durakovic/projects/oraclemcp/target cargo test -p oraclemcp --lib -- dispatch::tests::dictionary_tools_accept_default_owner_qualified_names_and_aliases passed: 1 passed, 364 filtered out.

limitations: The full dispatch::tests::audit_wiring:: filter is not green at this source: 8 of 16 tests fail before their audit assertions with ErrorClass::ForbiddenStatement and the message "read-only server could not prove this statement safe: a relation can invoke an unproven view, policy, or virtual-column dependency".

A forced fresh compile with RUSTFLAGS='--cfg oraclemcp_c6_split_probe' showed the same 8/16 red state with panic locations in crates/oraclemcp/src/dispatch/tests/audit_wiring.rs, proving the moved module is compiled and still asserts the same contracts.
The split is isomorphic only; no production dispatch, guard, database, or audit logic was changed.

known_defects.description: The audit-wiring read-path tests currently use semantic-read inputs such as SELECT 1 FROM dual and SELECT owner FROM all_objects that are refused before the audit assertions run under the tightened semantic-read guard.

follow_ups: Repair or adjudicate the audit-wiring semantic-read fixture inputs in a separate bead without weakening the fail-closed guard.
